data.title: Housing affordability improved for all Californians in 2025, but significant gaps remain wide for Black households, C.A.R. reports
data.description: The affordability gap for Hispanic/Latino households improved, while it worsened for Black households in California. Around 19% of Californians had adequate income to buy a median-priced detached home costing $875,550 in 2025, a slight increase from 18% in 2024. This was one of the findings among different ethnic groups, with shifts in affordability levels.
USTR Greer: US and the EU will explore how trade measures, such as border-adjusted price floors, could strengthen domestic industries

data.title: ISG to Study Providers of Advanced Analytics and AI Services
data.description: A recent study initiated by ISG in Stamford, Conn., focuses on service providers aiding companies in integrating AI into decision-making processes spanning innovation, customer experience, and operations. This comprehensive research aims to analyze the strategies and capabilities of these providers in utilizing AI technologies effectively. This study will delve into the services offered by these providers to assist companies in leveraging AI solutions for boosting efficiency and productivity across various sectors. Stay tuned for the findings of this study shedding light on the role of service providers in enhancing AI integration in businesses.

data.title: Des Moines FHLB reveals Q1 2026 financial results, declares dividend for shareholders.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 5.6% in 2021, as compared to the 3.5% decline it experienced in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The recovery is expected to be uneven across regions, with advanced economies growing by around 5.4% and emerging market and developing economies expanding by about 6%. This growth is mainly attributed to the successful rollout of vaccines, strong fiscal support, and the easing of restrictions in many countries. However, there are concerns about vaccine access disparities and the potential impact of new virus variants on the recovery process. Global trade is also projected to rebound by 6.9% in 2021 after a 5.3% decrease in the previous year. Inflation rates are expected to remain moderate, with advanced economies experiencing an average of 1.7% inflation and emerging markets facing slightly higher rates at around 4.1%. Overall, while there are positive signs of economic recovery, challenges remain in ensuring an inclusive and sustainable growth path for all countries.

data.title: British Airways launches special fares to celebrate 90 years of flying between Nigeria and the UK
data.description: British Airways is celebrating 90 years of connecting Nigeria and London, marking nine decades of linking the two nations. In honor of this achievement, customers can avail up to a 10% discount on specific fares, allowing them to save as much as USD 120 in World Traveller (long-haul economy). data.title: Automotive LiDAR Market to Grow at 32.09% CAGR Reaching USD 6.54 Billion by 2031, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of April 24, 2026, the automotive LiDAR market is experiencing significant growth, with the latest report from Mordor Intelligence indicating a rapid expansion. The market size has increased from USD 1.23 billion in 2025 to USD 1.63 billion in 2026. It is projected to continue on this upward trajectory, with expectations to reach USD 6.54 billion by 2031, reflecting a growth rate of 32.09%.

data.title: Sam Mead Announces Candidacy for U.S. Senate in Wyoming Republican Primary
data.description: Sam Mead, a fifth-generation Wyoming rancher and prominent business figure, has initiated a campaign aimed at safeguarding the lands of Wyoming and prioritizing the interests of the state in Washington. The campaign was launched in Thermopolis, Wyoming, on April 24, 2026, according to a press release. He is seeking election to the United States in an effort to advocate for the state's issues.

data.title: Ridgeline Roofing & Restoration Breaks Ground on New Headquarters in Odenville, Alabama
data.description: A home services company with its roots in Alabama has confirmed its commitment to the state while broadening its reach to over 20 locations under seven different brands. The expansion spans across various states from Minneapolis to Florida. Ridgeline Roofing & Restoration, the multi-brand company, recently marked the beginning stages of a new project in Odenville, Alabama.

data.title: ZINZINO AB (PUBL.): SHARE SUBSCRIPTION THROUGH A DIRECTED SET-OFF ISSUE
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on April 24, 2026, the Board of Directors of the Company, following the authorization given by the Annual General Meeting on May 28, 2025, announced a directed share issue through set-off. This resolution pertains to the issuance of 40,935 new Zinzino shares.
